briefdescription.para: Do the numerical integration. Advance the simulation.

detaileddescription.para: For debugging: Print contents of voxel pool.

briefdescription.para: Set initial timestep to use by the solver.

detaileddescription.para: setStoich: Assigns the ODE system and Stoich. Stoich may be modified to create a new RateTerm vector in case the volume of this VoxelPools is new.

briefdescription.para: Handles volume change and subsequent cascading updates.

detaileddescription.para: Handle volume updates. Inherited Virtual func.

briefdescription.para: Updates all the rate constants from the reference rates vector.

detaileddescription.para: Core computation function. Updates the reaction velocities vector yprime given the current mol 'n' vector s.

memberdef.argsstring: (const vector< RateTerm * > &rates, unsigned int numCoreRates, unsigned int index)
memberdef.name: updateRateTerms

detaileddescription.para: updateRateTerms updates the rate consts of a belonging to the specified index on the rates vector. It does recaling and assigning using values from the internal rates vector.
updateReacVelocities computes the velocity v of each reaction from the vector s of pool #s. This is a utility function for programs like SteadyState that need to analyze velocity.
updateReacVelocities computes the velocity v of each reaction. This is a utility function for programs like SteadyState that need to analyze velocity.

@Synopsis Function to pass LSODA::lsoda_update function. Since it is a * static function, we have to make sure void* param holds the value of pointer * to VoxelPools. * * @Param t * @Param y * @Param dydt * @Param params Address of VoxelPools as void*.
This is the class for handling reac-diff voxels used for deterministic computations.
